name: Motion for Redetermination of Interest Overpayment

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must have paid the entire deficiency plus interest and received a finding of overpayment under Section 6512(b).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a taxpayer to move the Tax Court to reopen a case within one year of finality to determine if they overpaid interest on a deficiency.
